verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: I swear by this city, Makkah -
verse.verse_2: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
verse.verse_3: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
verse.verse_4: We have certainly created man into hardship.
verse.verse_5: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
verse.verse_6: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
verse.verse_7: Does he think that no one has seen him?
verse.verse_8: Have We not made for him two eyes?
verse.verse_9: And a tongue and two lips?
verse.verse_10: And have shown him the two ways?
verse.verse_11: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
verse.verse_12: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
verse.verse_13: It is the freeing of a slave
verse.verse_14: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
verse.verse_16: Or a needy person in misery
verse.verse_17: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
verse.verse_18: Those are the companions of the right.
verse.verse_19: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.
verse.verse_20: Over them will be fire closed in.
